# Murat Sancak — murasanca

> The official website of Murat Sancak, a computer engineer and software developer known online as murasanca.

## Core Identity

- Canonical Domain: https://murasanca.com/
- Contact: murasanca@pm.me
- GitHub Username: murasanca
- Name: Murat Sancak
- Professional Title: Computer Engineer & Software Developer
